title: pleconax conica var. sartorii
intro:
Pleconax conica var. sartorii, also known as Sartor's Pleco, is a sub-species of the pleco catfish, but I couldn't find any information on a plant with that name.

However, I found that there is a plant called Pleocaulus conica, also known as Conical Pleurotus. 

Pleocaulus conica, or Conical Pleurotus, is a species of fungus in the family Pleurotaceae, and it is also known as Conical Oyster Mushroom. 

Pleocaulus conica, or Conical Pleurotus, is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and antifungal effects.
